hints.description: This company is a leading real estate investment trust (REIT) specializing in healthcare facilities. They own and operate a large portfolio of senior living communities and healthcare campuses across the United States and Canada, providing housing and care services for older adults. Notably, they focus on properties catering to a range of needs, from independent living to skilled nursing and memory care.
hints.funFact1: The company was formed in 2009 through the merger of ***** and Health Care Estates, combining their expertise in senior living and healthcare real estate.
hints.funFact2: CEO Jason D. Hancock previously served as the CEO of ***** Healthcare Investors, demonstrating a long history within the healthcare REIT sector.
